effect.requirement: The signature four-value asymmetric button border-radius must never be simplified to a single value, have its corners swapped, or its decimals rounded.

quotes: Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

effect.requirement: If the background must be skipped, remove only background-url, background-size, background-repeat, and background-position; keep background-color=#faa31b, the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as specified.

quotes: If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.
